page: Amazon Web Services r8idb.12xlarge is a memory-optimized eighth-generation server instance powered by Intel processors. It features 48 virtual CPUs mapped to 24 physical cores with hyper-threading enabled on a dedicated CPU allocation. The processor operates at a clock speed of 3.9 GHz using the x86_64 architecture.

This instance is equipped with 384.0 GB of system memory, providing a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per vCPU. For local storage, the r8idb.12xlarge includes 2850 GB of NVMe SSD instance store volumes, offering high-speed local read and write capabilities. The network infrastructure supports a baseline bandwidth of 50 Gbps, managed via the Nitro hypervisor.

The combination of high memory capacity, dedicated Intel processing power, and fast local NVMe SSD storage makes this instance class highly efficient for memory-intensive workloads that require rapid access to temporary storage. It is suitable for large-scale databases, in-memory caches, real-time analytics, and enterprise applications.
description: Amazon Web Services r8idb.12xlarge is an x86_64 memory-optimized server instance designed for resource-intensive workloads. Powered by a 3.9 GHz Intel processor, it offers 48 dedicated vCPUs across 24 physical cores and 384.0 GB of system memory. The instance features 2850 GB of local NVMe SSD storage, providing high-speed local data access without relying solely on network-attached storage. Operating on the Nitro hypervisor, it delivers a baseline network bandwidth of 50 Gbps. With its high memory-to-vCPU ratio and integrated instance store volumes, the r8idb.12xlarge is engineered for memory-heavy applications, large-scale databases, and real-time data processing tasks that benefit from rapid local storage and high network throughput.
og_description: Amazon Web Services r8idb.12xlarge is a memory-optimized instance featuring 48 vCPUs, 384 GB RAM, 2850 GB of local NVMe SSD storage, and 50 Gbps baseline network bandwidth on the Nitro hypervisor.

tagline: A memory-optimized x86_64 instance featuring dedicated Intel processors, high-speed local NVMe SSD storage, and 50 Gbps baseline network bandwidth.

384.0 GB of system memory for memory-intensive applications
